Package Index | Class Index
Summary: Methods | Inherited Methods | [Expand All]
public interface

TypedXmlSerializer

implements XmlSerializer
com.android.modules.utils.TypedXmlSerializer
Known Indirect Subclasses
ArtBinaryXmlSerializer, BinaryXmlSerializer
ArtBinaryXmlSerializer

This encodes large code-points using 4-byte sequences and is not compatible with the DataOutput API contract, which specifies that large code-points must be encoded with 3-byte sequences. 
BinaryXmlSerializer Serializer that writes XML documents using a custom binary wire protocol which benchmarking has shown to be 4.3x faster and use 2.4x less disk space than Xml.newFastSerializer() for a typical packages.xml. 

Class Overview

Specialization of XmlSerializer which adds explicit methods to support consistent and efficient conversion of primitive data types.

Summary

Public Methods
abstract XmlSerializer attributeBoolean(String namespace, String name, boolean value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
abstract XmlSerializer attributeBytesBase64(String namespace, String name, byte[] value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
abstract XmlSerializer attributeBytesHex(String namespace, String name, byte[] value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
abstract XmlSerializer attributeDouble(String namespace, String name, double value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
abstract XmlSerializer attributeFloat(String namespace, String name, float value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
abstract XmlSerializer attributeInt(String namespace, String name, int value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
abstract XmlSerializer attributeIntHex(String namespace, String name, int value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
abstract XmlSerializer attributeInterned(String namespace, String name, String value)
Functionally equivalent to XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String) but with the additional signal that the given value is a candidate for being canonicalized, similar to String.intern().
abstract XmlSerializer attributeLong(String namespace, String name, long value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
abstract XmlSerializer attributeLongHex(String namespace, String name, long value)
Encode the given strongly-typed value and serialize using XmlSerializer.attribute(String, String, String).
